title: File Server Configuration
description: Configuration for the File Server extension. Serves static files from the local filesystem through Envoy.

path_mappings.description: Mappings from URL path prefixes to filesystem path prefixes. At least one mapping is required. Duplicate request path prefixes are not allowed.

file_path_prefix.description: Filesystem path prefix to map to (e.g. "/var/www/").

content_types.description: Custom file extension to content-type mappings. Keys are file suffixes without dots (e.g. "html", "css").

default_content_type.description: Default content-type when the file extension is not found in content_types.

directory_index_files.description: Files to serve for directory requests (e.g. ["index.html"]). File names must not contain slashes.
